## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what changes and why. -->

## Related issues

Closes #
Refs #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adding or correcting tests
- [ ] build / ci / chore

## How was this tested?

<!-- Manual steps, screenshots, automated test names, etc. -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For frontend changes, drop a screenshot or short video. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `master`.
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes in every package touched.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds.
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests where practical.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` for user-facing changes.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or production data committed.
